configurations.name: FairGig Dev: Auth Service
configurations.command: Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/services/authService"; & "${workspaceFolder}/services/authService/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -m alembic upgrade head; & "${workspaceFolder}/services/authService/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000

configurations.name: FairGig Dev: Analytics Service
configurations.command: Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}/services/analyticsService"; & "${workspaceFolder}/services/analyticsService/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -m alembic upgrade head; & "${workspaceFolder}/services/analyticsService/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8003

configurations.name: FairGig Dev: Stop API Gateway
configurations.command: $gatewayPid = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if ($gatewayPid) { Stop-Process -Id $gatewayPid -Force; Write-Output "Stopped gateway process $gatewayPid" } else { Write-Output "No API gateway process listening on port 8080" }
